response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrable background in network security technologies like MACsec, 802.1X, or embedded switch firmware — instead, their experience is dominated by web, mobile, and full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript roles with minimal embedded or security-focused work.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain open-source infrastructure and tools
Proven track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling best practices
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded environments or Linux kernel work
Japanese language proficiency is completely absent — a hard requirement
No exposure to embedded networking, switch firmware, or security protocols like MACsec/802.1X
